"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2020.3.4\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\BijoyBayanno.dir/objects.a
D:\Program\mingw64\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\BijoyBayanno.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\BijoyBayanno.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Program\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g  -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\BijoyBayanno.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -o ..\build\bin\BijoyBayanno.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libBijoyBayanno.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\BijoyBayanno.dir\linklibs.rsp
